name: in-toto
allowed_use_boundary: Use layouts and signed link metadata as supply-chain provenance evidence only.
claims: in-toto verifies intended software supply-chain steps and functionaries.
non_claims: Verified provenance is not current delegation.
Supply-chain conformance is not runtime admissibility.

transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no runtime admissibility or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.receipt_or_trace_model: signed link metadata and local references
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: layouts and links support build-path reconstruction
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, mapping, signature evidence, or authority overclaim
